Interaction Detail
Tangible Interaction

My name is Aditya Padmagirwar, I design immersive narratives and interactive systems that solve difficult communication problems. I research, prototype and build experiences across XR, cultural storytelling, and speculative urban futures.

Education

Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology Delhi (IIIT-Delhi)

New Delhi, India

B.Tech in Computer Science and Social Science

Career Snapshot

Work Experience

AdiNex.AI, Startup | Product Manager

Jun 2025 - Current
  • Led end-to-end delivery of AI/ML products from experimentation to production with cross-functional teams.
  • Owned technical planning, GitHub workflows, testing pipelines, and cloud deployments, translating business goals into sprint-ready roadmaps.

Creative Interfaces Lab, IIIT Delhi | Undergraduate Researcher

May 2023 - Current
  • Led R&D on tangible storytelling systems using LLMs as narrative agents.
  • Designed prototypes and ran user evaluations focused on South Asian and non-Western storytelling in XR and tangible interfaces.

IWay Plus, IIT Delhi | UX Researcher

Sep 2024 - Dec 2024
  • Researched accessibility and navigation behaviors and translated findings into LLM-enabled UX solutions.
  • Mapped IRCH-AIIMS patient journeys (1,500+ daily outpatients), proposing interventions that could reduce waiting time by 20-30% and improve clinical throughput.

IMXD Lab, IDC School of Design, IIT Bombay | Research Intern

May 2024 - Jul 2024
  • Conducted immersive media research and built a Unity VR prototype for contemporary art translation.
  • Developed a Rhino-Grasshopper to G-code workflow for 4D printing and co-authored research on affordances in shape-changing interfaces.

Applied Research

Projects

Studying Behaviour in Gacha Games

Course Project
  • Designed a controlled experiment on loss aversion and sunk-cost effects in gacha decision-making.
  • Simulated 3 gameplay conditions and analyzed survey responses using Prospect Theory and thematic methods.

Design Affordances in 4D Printed Objects

Internship Project
  • Built an automated Rhino-Grasshopper pipeline for 4D printing G-code generation.
  • Ran studies with 40+ participants and contributed to a paper proposing 5+ design guidelines for intuitive interaction.

Navigating Indoor Spaces for the BVI

Independent Project
  • Designed a smartphone indoor navigation concept for blind and visually impaired users using tactile and audio guidance.
  • Combined user research, competitive analysis (10+ tools), and multilingual testing plans to target inclusive global accessibility.

Publications

  1. Aditya Padmagirwar (2026). Playing, Watching, Telling: Design Research into Digital Reinterpretation of Indian Vernacular Artefacts. Conference Proceedings of ACM Creativity and Cognition 2026. Accepted for publication in July.
  2. Saumik S., Aditya Padmagirwar, Shivoy A., Anmol S. (2024). KaavadBits: Exploring Branching Narratives for Tangible Interactive Storytelling Through a Kaavad-inspired Diegetic Installation. Conference Proceedings of ACM TEI'24 | DOI > 10.1145/3623509.3635251.
  3. Saumik S., Aditya Padmagirwar, Shivoy A., Anmol S. (2024). KaavadBits: An Interactive Art Installation for a New Narrative Experience. Conference Proceedings of Arts Track at IndiaHCI 2023 | Link. Initially presented in the Arts Track at IndiaHCI and later published. Won the Special Mention Award for the presentation.

Relevant Coursework

Affective Computing, Human-Centered Interactive Systems, Data Structures and Algorithms, Analysis and Design of Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming, Neuroscience of Decision Making, Attention and Perception, Behavioral Economics, Research Methods in Social Sciences and Design, Enhancement Technologies and the Body, Computation for Medicine, Ethics in AI, Image Screen and Interfaces, Philosophy of Technology, Music Machine Mathematics, User Experience of Extended Reality, Design Research Methodology, Design of AI Driven Products.

Skills

Technical Skills

Design Thinking, User Research and Testing, Study Design, Data Analysis, Rapid Design and Prototyping, Programming.

Programming

HTML/CSS, Python, C/C++, SQL, Processing (P5.js), C#, R, oTree, LaTeX.

Tools

Unity, Figma/Adobe XD, Arduino IDE, Rhino Grasshopper, Linux/Unix Shell, Git Workflow, TouchDesigner.

Libraries

Rhino3dm, rhinoscriptsyntax, ARKit, pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, 3js, scikit, PsychoPy.

Selected Work

Case Study

KaavadBits

A tangible storytelling installation reinterpreting Kaavad Baanchana through ritual gesture and interaction design.

 Research

Playing, Watching, Telling

A design research investigation on preserving vernacular artefacts as lived experiences rather than static documentation.

 XR Prototype

VR Lagori

A somatic VR memory-space inspired by seven-stone play, emphasizing body movement and emotional recall.

 Speculative XR

UDXR Sandbox

An experimental toolkit for speculative urban design conversations through immersive and participatory workflows.
